name: sunset-metronome
description: Periodic pulse generator that drives the nerve grid. Each beat triggers compute, gate, route, and optional harmonic phases (breeding, FLUX audit). Supports BPM negotiation, drift correction, and CRDT-style beat sync across fleet nodes.

skills.name: Beat Sync
skills.description: Exchange beat state with peer nodes for drift detection and correction via CRDT-style merge
examples: Sync my node 42 with the fleet consensus beat

skills.name: BPM Negotiation
skills.description: Negotiate fleet-wide tempo changes with ramped transitions to avoid jarring phase jumps
examples: Ramp fleet BPM from 120 to 240 over 5000ms

skills.name: Drift Correction
skills.description: Apply phase nudge, skip-jump, or partition fallback strategies to keep nodes in phase
examples: Correct drift on node 7 — consensus beat is 3 ahead

skills.name: Metronome Status
skills.description: Return current metronome health: beat counter, actual vs target BPM, missed beats, harmonic registry
examples: What is the current fleet metronome status?
